final_answer: If someone tests positive for COVID-19, they should self-isolate at home and avoid going to public places to prevent spreading the virus. It's important to let their healthcare team know about the positive test and any concerning symptoms. They should also call ahead before visiting a healthcare provider and wear a face mask when entering the provider's office. Additionally, they should keep indoor spaces well ventilated and wash their hands frequently using soap and water or an alcohol-based hand rub [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00012][doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00021][doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00017][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00094].
